title: Scourge (disambiguation)
content:
'''Scourge''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Skutu]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[TIE pilot]] nicknamed "'''Scourge'''"
*The '''[[Scourge]]''', a [[droid]] that spread the "[[scourge of the droids]]" during the [[Imperial Era]].
*The '''[[Great Scourge of Malachor]]''', a battle between the [[Jedi]] and the [[Sith]] at the [[Malachor Sith Temple]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Scourge (Sith)|Scourge]]''', a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]]
*'''[[Scourge (Broadside-class)|''Scourge'']]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Broadside-class cruiser kdb-1|''Broadside''-class cruiser]]
*'''[[Scourge (Victory I-class)|''Scourge'']]''', an Imperial [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''[[Scourge (Qektoth Attack Cruiser)|''Scourge'']]''', a [[Qektoth attack cruiser]]
*'''[[Scourge (yacht)|''Scourge'']]''', a [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] owned by the [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] [[Atlee Thanda]]
*'''[[Trel Skutu]]''', an Imperial [[TIE pilot]] who went by the callsign "'''Scourge'''"
*The '''[[Scourge (Belsavis)|Scourge]]''', a criminal organization operating on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]
*'''[[The Scourge]]''', a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group that operated in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]
*'''[[Scourge (unit)|Scourge]]''', a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] military unit
*'''[[Scourge (kusak)|Scourge]]''', a [[kusak]]
*'''[[Scourge (drug)|Scourge]]''', a drug

==Real world==
*'''[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]''', a novel
